scope.summary: Polish the desktop cloud-only UI for daily use, remove frontend local-mode code paths, expose device revoke controls, and render group sender avatars.
goals: Make cloud sign-in/device/linking states clearer in the QR/login gate
Expose cloud mode and realtime status in the chat shell
Remove frontend calls to legacy local commands
List and revoke cloud devices from Settings
Render message-bubble avatars from per-sender metadata for group messages
Improve file/send affordances in cloud mode
nonGoals: Removing Rust core local commands used by dev/test

acceptance.description: Cloud mode surfaces connection status, device/account state, retry/error states, device revocation, group sender avatars, and send/file affordances clearly with cloud-only copy and no frontend legacy local command calls.

verification.manual: Attach frontend check/build output and a static UI review summary for the touched Svelte components.
